summary: Homepage polish verified. Nav admin hidden, /admin still works, hero eyebrow present, Atelier image loads (naturalWidth=1400), ProductCards have equal heights and view/quick-add testids, cart badge increments 0->1 on quick-add click, no horizontal overflow at any viewport, header 81px at 390, collage has 0 imgs, reasons has 8 cards, /catalog shows 26 products, /about renders. CRITICAL: Emergent badge CSS override is NOT applied — element has computed display:flex and is visible in screenshot. Minor: trust-row label 'Established' not found (other labels 'Designs' and 'Pan-India' are present).
passed: Hero eyebrow contains SINCE 1981 and HANDCRAFTED IN FIROZABAD
6 ProductCards on Featured each have view-btn-<id> and quick-add-<id>
First 4 card heights identical (5854.31px each, diff=0)
quick-add click increments cart badge from empty to 1

failed.issue: #emergent-badge is still visible. getComputedStyle().display === 'flex' (expected 'none'). Badge 'Made with Emergent' visible in bottom-right of screenshot.
failed.evidence: page.evaluate returned {exists:true, display:'flex', visibility:'visible'}; screenshot on /about confirms badge visible.

failed.issue: Text 'Established' not found on homepage body. 'Designs' and 'Pan-India' are found. Trust point label for the 1981 item may differ from spec.

Could not detect a toast/status element after quick-add click (selectors: [class*=toast],[role=status],[class*=Toast]). Cart badge did update, so core functionality works; toast may use a different selector.
failed.evidence: toast query returned null but cart badge went from '' to '1'

action_items: Investigate why #emergent-badge{display:none!important} in App.css is not overriding the injected badge. Likely the badge element uses a different id/class, is in a shadow DOM, or is inserted after CSS with inline style. Consider targeting via [class*=emergent], or the actual selector used by the injected badge (e.g., a[href*='emergent.sh']), and use MutationObserver or inline <style> in index.html to guarantee it hides.
Verify hero 'trust points row' label for the 1981 item — spec expects 'Established' but the rendered label differs. Confirm intended copy.
Optional: add a data-testid on the shadcn/sonner toast so tests can assert it appears after quick-add.
